title: TurtleFPS - Boost your FPS!
description: [1.21 Version] A simple modpack to enhance your experience, improve performance and have fun with your friends!
body:
**Tired of lagging**? Try this **modpack** and enjoy a **lag-free experience** with **high performance** and guaranteed **fun** with your friends!

## Main Features

![Optimization](https://i.ibb.co/JCHJCV8/Need-a-Server-2.png)
Thanks to the mods in the modpack, such as **sodium**, **indium**, **dynamic FPS** and many others (which you can discover!) you can enjoy a **lag-free experience** without sacrificing texture quality and get the best vanilla experience!


The modpack has support for the **highest quality shaders** for the best performance! (no shaders are preinstalled in the modpack)

![Cosmetics and Emotes](https://i.ibb.co/MM4mhS2/Need-a-Server-3.png)
Thanks to the **'Essentials' mod**, you can enjoy lots of new **cosmetic** items such as fantastic animated **capes**, mythological **wings**, creative **backpacks**, enchanting **particles**, **cute pets**, special **hats**, magical **ears** and fantastic **costumes**!
Unlock **legendary items** and compete with your friends on who has the best ones!

Try out **all the emotes** and have fun communicating with your friends!

![Play Together](https://i.ibb.co/1rfnS3y/Need-a-Server-4.png)
Thanks to the **'Essentials' mod**, you can **host your own worlds** and make them accessible to your friends list! You can change lots of permissions, make them operators and **have fun** with them **without buying a server**!

**Share your screenshots** in the in-game chat with your friends and have fun challenging them for who takes the best screenshots!

Keep up to date directly in the game! You can create and view **your friends' blogs** to see what they are building or their new advancements in a dark-theme interface!

[GET your FREE CAPE NOW!](https://legendlabs.lol/cloaks)
USE CODE: TURTLEFPS at checkout

[Sito in ITALIANO](https://foxshar.my.canva.site/turtlefps)

# Have Fun! [Created by Legend Team]
